_notes: Real store: ST1008 (Purplle Brigade Road, Bangalore). Zone names/structure taken from the official Brigade Road store floor plan: entrance bottom-left, SKINCARE brand wall along the top (The Face Shop, DermDoc, Minimalist, Aqualogica, Good Vibes, Lakme Skin), MAKEUP brand wall along the bottom + F.O.H makeup units (Maybelline, Faces Canada, Lakme, Colorbar, Swiss Beauty, NY Bae), CASH COUNTER (billing) on the right, plus Nail Unit / PMU services. The 5 CCTV clips map onto these zones. Clips are ~2-2.5 min at 25-30fps; clip overlay timestamp is 2026-04-10 ~20:09 IST, used as each clip's start time. Zone polygons are pixel coordinates of the 1920x1080 frame, refined in pipeline/zones.py. The original brief's example id STORE_BLR_002 also returns a valid (zero-traffic) response.

entry_line._desc: Crossing this segment inbound (toward store interior, i.e. moving up-left into the wooden floor) = ENTRY; outbound = EXIT. Tuned against CAM 3.

staff_zone._desc: Upper region behind the billing counter (cash desk) at 1920x1080 — only staff stand here. Strong staff signal (tested with the box centre since legs are occluded).

cameras._notes: Backroom/stock area. Anyone detected here is treated as staff (is_staff=true). Not part of customer-facing zones.

staff_rules.uniform_hint: Store staff wear dark/black uniform tops; dominant upper-body color near-black is a staff signal.
